subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Most Glorious Kingdom! By God, verily the tribes of the Supreme Concourse pray for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المتوجه الی الملکوت الابهی تالله الحق ان قبائل الملا الاعلی یصلین علی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @light and darkness, @the concourse on high
